title: Messi has no equals, and if not for him, Argentina...
summary: Argentina defeated Egypt in a remarkable comeback, with Lionel Messi's performance being the decisive factor in their World Cup advancement. His continued excellence at the tournament underscores his singular influence on his team's success.
content: Argentina's remarkable comeback win against Egypt was all down to Lionel Messi, who is seemingly dragging his team to another final.

zh.title: 梅西无人可比，如果没有他，阿根廷...

title: Let's face it: The USMNT's coach doesn't matter --...
summary: Despite high expectations and significant investment in their coach, the USMNT's World Cup performance fell short primarily due to player-level issues rather than coaching failures. The analysis suggests that talent constraints were the limiting factor in the team's tournament run.
content: U.S. fans expected more out of the USMNT's expensive, famous coach at the World Cup, but there was one problem: the players.

title: The 8 most important players of the World Cup quar...
summary: With the World Cup field narrowed to eight teams in the quarterfinals, individual player performances become increasingly decisive factors in determining tournament outcomes. The article highlights how superstar players have greater impact during knockout stages.
content: The World Cup field has been whittled down to eight teams, and individual superstars are more influential at this point in the tournament.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool ahead of Man Unit...

title: Ahead of Argentina test, Switzerland will look to ...

title: VAR review: Were Egypt unfairly denied a pivotal g...

content: Mostafa Ziko thought he had put his team up 2-0, but the video assistant intervened. Was it the correct call?

title: Salah bids goodbye to the World Cup, with Messi fi...

Unlike other players marketed as "the next Messi," Salah has established his own legendary legacy in international football.
content: Where other 'new Messi's failed, Salah departs the World Cup, a legend in his own right.

title: Benitez refuses to rule out Scotland interest - gossip

title: Unusual or predictable? How Europe is dominating the World Cup
summary: European teams constitute six of the eight World Cup quarterfinal teams in North America, reflecting either a demographic anomaly or a predictable pattern of European dominance in the tournament. Historical analysis suggests various factors contributing to European teams' consistent strength in World Cup competitions.
content: Six of the eight quarter-finalists at the World Cup in North America are from Europe, so why are they doing so well and what does history tell us about the chances of one of them winning it all?

title: Football Daily
summary: Argentina's dramatic 3-2 comeback victory over Egypt involved controversial VAR decisions that may have influenced the match outcome. The analysis examines whether video review technology altered Egypt's chances of advancing in the World Cup round of 16.

zh.title: 足球每日

title: Swiss overcome penalty 'curse' to oust Colombia
summary: Switzerland defeated Colombia on penalties to advance to the World Cup quarterfinals, with manager Murat Yakin celebrating the team's breakthrough in penalty shootouts. The victory represents a significant moment for Swiss football, breaking their historical struggles in decisive penalty situations.
content: Switzerland manager Murat Yakin expressed his delight at breaking the country's penalty "curse" after beating Colombia in a shootout Tuesday to reach the quarterfinals of the World Cup.

zh.title: 瑞士克服点球"魔咒"淘汰哥伦比亚
zh.summary: 瑞士在点球大战中战胜哥伦比亚，晋级世界杯四分之一决赛，主帅穆拉特·亚金为球队在点球大战中的突破而庆祝。这场胜利代表瑞士足球的重要时刻，打破了他们在决定性点球情形中的历史困境。

title: 👀 Mahomes, Brunson lead Argentina win reaction
summary: Argentina's dramatic 3-2 comeback victory over Egypt in the World Cup round of 16 generated enthusiastic reactions across the sports world, including from notable American athletes like Mahomes and Brunson. The match captured widespread attention for its thrilling conclusion and narrative significance.
content: The sports world was thrilled by Argentina's epic 3-2 comeback win over Egypt in the World Cup round of 16.

zh.title: 👀 马霍姆斯、布伦森领衔阿根廷胜利反应
zh.summary: 阿根廷在世界杯16强赛中以3-2戏剧性逆转击败埃及，引起体育界的热烈反应，包括来自马霍姆斯和布伦森等知名美国运动员的反应。这场比赛因其惊险的结局和叙事意义而获得广泛关注。

title: Messi saves Argentina in dramatic win over Egypt
summary: Lionel Messi scored his record sixth consecutive World Cup knockout-stage goal as Argentina mounted a stunning late comeback to defeat Egypt 3-2 and advance to the quarterfinals. The victory from Atlanta showcased Messi's continued excellence in crucial tournament moments.
content: Lionel Messi scored in a record sixth straight World Cup knockout match to help Argentina reach the quarterfinals with a stunning late comeback to beat Egypt 3-2 in Atlanta.

zh.title: 梅西在戏剧性击败埃及的胜利中拯救阿根廷
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西打进他创造纪录的第六个连续世界杯淘汰赛阶段进球，阿根廷发起令人惊艳的最后时刻逆转以3-2击败埃及，晋级四分之一决赛。来自亚特兰大的这场胜利展示了梅西在重要赛事关键时刻的持续卓越表现。

title: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties to reach quarter-finals
summary: Switzerland advanced to the World Cup quarter-finals by defeating Colombia 4-3 on penalties, with goalkeeper Gregor Kobel making a crucial save. The victory sets up a quarter-final matchup against Argentina.
content: Gregor Kobel is Switzerland's penalty hero, after pulling off a stunning shootout save from Colombia's Cucho Hernandez to help set up a quarter-final clash with Argentina.

zh.title: 瑞士在点球大战中击败哥伦比亚晋级四分之一决赛
zh.summary: 瑞士通过点球大战4-3战胜哥伦比亚，晋级世界杯四分之一决赛。门神格雷戈尔·科贝尔做出了关键扑救。这场胜利为瑞士与阿根廷的四分之一决赛对阵铺平了道路。

title: Watch every penalty from Switzerland v Colombia shootout
summary: Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 in a penalty shootout to advance to the World Cup quarter-finals. The match was decided by shootout after regular time ended level.
content: Watch the full penalties as Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 in the shootout to advance to the quarter-finals.
